SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Apr-26-2023 Set For Trial On Apr-26-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-25-2023 Continued To Apr-26-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-26-2023 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Appellant, Defendant, Carol Chandler, the moving party.
Respondent, Plaintiff Rodney Lame and Jason Lame, the opposing party.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.
Plaintiff/Respondent, Jason Lame testified on behalf of himself.
Defendant/Appellant, Carol Chandler testified on behalf of herself.

Appellant, Defendant Carol Chandler testifies on his behalf. The following evidence is submitted:
A: Piece of metal from the bathtub
B: Photograph
C: DVI report

Respondent, Plaintiff Rodney Lame testifies on her own behalf. The following evidence is submitted:

#1: Receipt for 1st repair
#2: Estimate for the second repair
#3 Hotel Bill during 1st repair
#4 Second DVI Report
#5 Plumber report

All exhibits were reviewed and returned to parties.

At the conclusion of the case, the matter is taken under submission.
Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval; Clerk: C. Balanga; Not Reported. (D514)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-17-2023 Judgment Entered
